markdownRemark.html:
Awesome Dropwizard

Useful resources for creating apps with Dropwizard

Contributing

Please take a quick look at the contribution guidelines first.

Editor Support

Support for your favorite editors.

Eclipse

  • dropwizard-toolsstars3 - Eclipse Tools for Dropwizard

Open Source

  • dropwizard-swaggerstars170 - Serves Swagger UI static content and loads Swagger endpoints.
  • dropwizard-jaxwsstars46 - enables building SOAP web services and clients using JAX-WS API.
  • dropwizard-redirect-bundlestars13 - allows for HTTP redirects.
  • dropwizard-template-configstars48 - enables you to write your config.yaml as a Freemarker template.
  • dropwizard-caching-bundlestars7 - generate cache-control options for resources and caching responses.
  • dropwizard-xmlstars32 - Dropwizard bundle for processing and validating XMLs
  • dropwizard-cryptostars14 - A Cryptographic Bundle for Dropwizard
  • dropwizard-circuitbreakerstars40 - A circuit breaker design pattern for dropwizard
  • dropwizard-maxmind-bundlestars6 - MaxMind GeoIP2 support for dropwizard
  • dropwizard-protobufstars45 - Support for reading and writing Google Protocol Buffer objects within Dropwizard
  • dropwizard-activemq-bundlestars32 - send and receive JSON via ActiveMQ in your Dropwizard application
  • dropwizard-consulstars54 - A Consul bundle for Dropwizard
  • dropwizard-zipkinstars50 - A Zipkin bundle for Dropwizard
  • dropwizard-graphqlstars49 - A GraphQL bundle for Dropwizard
  • dropwizard-moneystars1 - A Money bundle for Dropwizard
  • breakerboxstars60 - Frontend for Tenacity + Archaius
  • tenacitystars204 - A Hystrix bundle for Dropwizard
  • dropwizard-grpcstars26 - use a gRPC server in a Dropwizard service
  • sqs-dropwizardstars14 - Amazon SQS integration
  • dropwizard-simple-corsstars1 - A Dropwizard bundle to provide simple, sensible CORS support
  • dropwizard-version-infostars7 - A Dropwizard bundle which exposes a version endpoint

Boilerplate Destruction

  • Brahma-HibernateUtilsstars9 - An annotation processor to keep track of @Entity classes to make entity registration in dropwizard super simple.

Authentication

  • dropwizard-auth-ldapstars36 - LDAP authentication for Dropwizard
  • dropwizard-jwt-cookie-authenticationstars29 - Dropwizard bundle managing authentication through JWT cookies

Assets

  • dropwizard-configurable-assets-bundlestars58 - An implementation of an AssetBundle for use in Dropwizard that allows user configuration.
  • dropwizard-markdown-assets-bundlestars4 - renders Markdown files as pretty HTML

Data Stores

  • dropwizard-etcdstars3 - A Dropwizard Bundle for Etcd
  • dropwizard-mongostars20 - Factories and health checks for connecting to mongoDB.
  • dropwizard-elasticsearchstars59 - A set of classes for using Elasticsearch in a Dropwizard service
  • dropwizard-service-discoverystars13 - Zookeeper service discovery bundle and client for dropwizard.
  • dropwizard-cassandrastars59 - Dropwizard support for Cassandra
  • dropwizard-riakstars1 - Dropwizard support for Riak
  • dropwizard-orient-serverstars15 - Embedded OrientDB server for dropwizard
  • dropwizard-atomixstars1 - Integration with Atomix

Metrics

  • riemann-bundlestars0 - Simplifies dropwizard metrics integration into Riemann
  • metrics - Metrics Libraries

Logging

  • dropwizard-gelfstars52 - Addon bundle for Dropwizard to support logging to a GELF-enabled servers
  • dropwizard-ravenstars19 - Dropwizard integration for error logging to Sentry
  • dropwizard-logstash-encoderstars18 - Dropwizard logging addon for sending logs using the logstash-logback-encoder

Scheduled/Recurrence Jobs

  • dropwizard-quartzstars53 - Simple Job Scheduler implementation integrating Guice and Quartz.
  • dropwizard-jobsstars2 - Quartz integration for dropwizard
  • dropwizard-sundialstars35 - Scheduled jobs in Dropwizard using Sundial

Guice

  • dropwizard-guicestars268 - Adds support for Guice.
  • dropwizard-guiceystars198 - Dropwizard guice integration
  • dropwizard-guicierstars40 - A Dropwizard bundle to handle Guice integration.

Deployment

  • WizToWarstars40 - Build WARs from your Dropwizard apps
  • wizard-in-a-boxstars31 - deploy Dropwizard apps as a war

  • Getting Started

  • Dropwizard Modules Directory

  • Serving Static Assets with DropWizard

  • Using Dropwizard in combination with Elasticsearch
  • Deploy a Dropwizard Unikernel to AWS
  • Use Consul's KV store for Dropwizard settings
  • Deploying Dropwizard on App Engine Flex
  • Measuring the performance of your Dropwizard application
  • Heroku + Gradle + Dropwizard

Community

  • dropwizard-user
  • StackOverflow
  • @dropwizardio on twitter

Videos

Contribute

Contributions welcome! Read the contribution guidelines first.
